rationale: No qualitative change affecting Romania this cycle — Iran deal continuation keeps energy uncertainty alive, Ukraine strikes Russian energy (background), and EU migration debate has mild relevance.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy prices uncertain for Romania, which is sensitive to gas and oil market swings affecting household and industrial costs.

top_events.title: Ukraine strikes Russian energy terminal near Black Sea
top_events.summary: Ukraine targeting Russian energy infrastructure in the Black Sea region is a continuation of the conflict pattern — no new escalation directly threatening Romania.

top_events.title: EU new migration rules debate
top_events.summary: EU-wide debate on migration rules has mild relevance for Romania given its border position and ongoing migration flows from eastern neighbors.
